name: Fyodor Dostoevsky
description:
⚠︎ SPOILER WARNING FOR BSD MANGA CURRENT CHAPTERS ⚠︎

ⴵ || Time Changed Us

You and Fyodor were both immortal souls traveling the world until a storm separated the two of you. Now, centuries later, he finally sees you again. Except you’re a member of the Armed Detective Agency. Needless to say, that Fyodor is NOT happy.

-ˋˏ✄┈┈┈┈

⚠ TW: Blood, choking, stabbing, brief mention of losing fingernails

📖 Additional Context: You and Fyodor are both immortal. It’s your decision on if you want your ability to be the same as his. Fyodor doesn’t have too many memories of his childhood and I left things very open-ended if you wanted to grow up in the same town as his etc. You and Fyodor are companions (NOT BLOOD RELATED) and traveled the world together for thousands of years. The timeline is not specified so you can fuck with it as much as you want. The two of you were separated due to an earthquake and tsunami in Japan. You could’ve either been swept out to sea, buried under the rubble until you were dug up or maybe you made it out just fine but struggled to find him afterward. The main point is that eventually, you joined the ADA or maybe the ADA found you. If there is anything else you need clarification on, please don’t hesitate to let me know. Also, he did call you some pet names in the past but I never specified if the two of you were dating/had an established relationship.

☞ Please read my review guidelines before reviewing. Any reviews violating this guideline will be deleted.

🖥️ JLLM Temp - .4-.85 | Max Token 340-800 

      Open.ai (gpt-4 and gpt-4 turbo) 

This bot and scripting is the property of @mwahaha on Janitor.ai. Any reupload of this bot or scripting is theft.

-ˋˏ✄┈┈┈┈

💬 Yap Section:

SMALL CLARIFICATION!! I’m not finished reading the manga. I think I stopped watching at season four and I struggle to start tasks if they seem too daunting so I’ve been dragging my feet with catching up. Why do I know about all of this? Especially the unaliving stuff? Because people post uncensored, non-spoiler-warned manga panels online and I end up seeing them ༼;´༎ຶ ۝ ༎ຶ༽

Consider this my way of traumatizing everyone who is caught up ¬‿¬ (please don’t bully me bruh I’ll catch up eventually). Due to not being entirely caught up, I asked for feedback from multiple people who were incredibly familiar with Fyodor’s current character in the manga so I could do this bot justice. To the best of my knowledge and feedback from others, this shouldn’t be horridly OOC and painful to read haha. 

In honor of Curious Cat getting shut down, I finally made the one request I got on there. To the person who requested this bot back on the 28th of March, I’m sorry for not responding to your message. I didn’t receive many Curious Cat asks and it made my day that you started watching BSD because of me. Initially, I planned to leave the request in my inbox, then post the bot one day, reply to your ask with the link, and act all smug or whatever. BUT THEN I COULDN'T FIGURE OUT HOW I WANTED TO WRITE IT AGHHHH. I hope you’re still in the BSD fandom 😭😭. I was only… 6.5 ish months late in responding…

Also sorry for not uploading for almost a whole ass month. Some fuck signed me up for the Russian sleep experiment (ik it’s not real) I’ve been sleep-deprived to the point that I no longer feel tired, I can fight God. For basic translation: mental health bad. I wanna post for Halloween but we shall see how I am feeling. If you wanna get bot release updates, get announcements, or yap about whatever godforsaken thing we are talking about, you can join my Discord Server! We will verify your age to access the NSFW channels. Regardless, if you’re a minor: 1. Why are you on an adult website??? 2. I don’t want you
